article_title: WorkSafeBC’s average base premium rate unchanged in 2026

briefs.title: WorkSafeBC holds average premium rate at $1.55 per $100 payroll for ninth consecutive year
briefs.summary: WorkSafeBC has kept the 2026 average base premium rate unchanged at $1.55 per $100 of assessable payroll, returning ~$570M in surplus funds to employers. Rate increase caps were lowered to 10%, while decreases can reach ~40%, with some sectors seeing significant reductions.
briefs.action_required: Check your industry-specific 2026 WorkSafeBC rate to confirm whether your premiums have changed from 2025.
briefs.article_title: WorkSafeBC’s average base premium rate unchanged in 2026
